title: ECHS Sri Ganganagar – Female Attendant, Pharmacist and More – 8 Posts

basic_details.job_title: ECHS Sri Ganganagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Female Attendant, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS Sri Ganganagar) Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Staff in ECHS Polyclinic. Candidates with 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, BDS, D Pharma, GNM, Diploma Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through ECHS Sri Ganganagar official website.

qualification.education_qualification: 8th Pass, Graduate, MBBS, BDS, D Pharma, GNM, Diploma Holder in Dental, Literate

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Sri Ganganagar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
